holdings.infoBox: VB is an equity ETF with a total of 1316 individual holdings. The top holdings are Slcmt1142 stock at 1.49%, Flex Ltd. at 0.69%, Astera Labs at 0.62%, Ciena at 0.51%, and Rocket Lab at 0.51%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Small-Cap ETF (VB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Small Cap index. The fund seeks to track a market-cap-weighted portfolio that provides small-cap exposure to the US equity space. VB was launched on Jan 26, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.
